scheme.title: Climate Data Hub Resource Type Vocabulary
scheme.description: Controlled vocabulary of broad resource kinds used to describe the primary thing a CDH record is about. These values describe the record-level resource, not individual asset formats. CDH author-facing ids are mapped to schema.org types, which drive the record's schema.org/JSON-LD output.

concepts.label: Dataset
concepts.description: Structured data, observations, model outputs, geospatial layers, tables, or other data products.

concepts.label: Software
concepts.description: A runnable or installable computational resource - tool, application, dashboard, workflow, or model interface.

concepts.label: Service
concepts.description: A hosted, network-accessed endpoint rather than a downloadable artifact - e.g., an API, web/OGC service, or online data catalog.

concepts.label: AI skill
concepts.description: Reusable AI-agent skill, prompt package, workflow capability, or assistant extension intended to perform a defined task. schema.org has no dedicated AI-skill type; SoftwareApplication is the closest.

concepts.label: Document
concepts.description: Written resource such as a report, brief, paper, guidance note, manual, documentation, or other text-based output.
